stem: Which of the following expressions is equivalent to (sin24ยฐ)(cos66ยฐ) + (cos24ยฐ)(sin66ยฐ) ?
explanation: The sine of an angle equals the cosine of its complement, and 24ยฐ and 66ยฐ are complementary. So sin24ยฐ = cos66ยฐ and sin66ยฐ = cos24ยฐ. Substituting gives (cos66ยฐ)(cos66ยฐ) + (cos24ยฐ)(cos24ยฐ) = (cos66ยฐ)ยฒ + (cos24ยฐ)ยฒ.
